productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Embark Grey Sandals
description: If comfort is on your mind, these sandals from nike's ACG (All Conditions Gear) range will transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish, super comfy and lightweight, they will make you feel like you are walking on a bed of roses all day. Ruggedly crafted for casual wear with a tough outsole, you can team them with jeans or shorts and step out in style. Upper Synthetic upper with woven mesh overlays for rugged feel and style Over-the-foot straps for added comfort Click clocks for ease in removal and wearing, and for a customised Fit Back strap to hold the foot firmly in place nike swoosh on the side Midsole Air cushioning unit in the pylon midsole guarantees a smooth and responsive ride Well cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for soft touch and protection from blisters Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Square lugs all over for excellent traction and grip on all surfaces Flex grooves for ease of movement Sandal care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
